alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with experience in global commercial operations, transformation programs, and scaling operations; product operations background with ownership of requirements, logic design, and rollout
alignments.job_requirement: Own and maintain the nutrition database for every recipe and ingredient, keeping it accurate and proactively spotting opportunities to improve the nutritional quality of our products

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product operations experience with cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management; no food/nutrition/culinary domain expertise
alignments.job_requirement: Partner closely with Culinary to review and approve recipe formulations, troubleshooting constraints and optimising our recipes for customer value

alignments.candidate_evidence: Program leadership and transformation program experience suggests ability to build and scale programs, but no health/nutrition/dietitian program context
alignments.job_requirement: Develop, manage, and scale our nutrition consultation programme - including bringing on and coordinating part-time dietitians, reporting on program quality and effectiveness, and hosting customer-facing sessions as needed

alignments.candidate_evidence: No direct evidence of nutrition content creation, PR, social media, or marketing work in profile
alignments.job_requirement: Create nutrition-focused content for PR, social media, and customer education, and support marketing and growth initiatives with credible, engaging messaging

gaps.gap: Registered Dietitian credential and active EU certification/licence
gaps.mitigation: Candidate does not hold a Registered Dietitian designation; this is a core professional qualification, not a nice-to-have

gaps.gap: 3+ years practising as a Registered Dietitian with deep knowledge of dietary lifestyles (GLP-1, ketogenic, vegan, etc.)
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has no documented nutrition or dietetics background; the depth required is domain-specific and not transferable from operations

gaps.gap: Experience in recipe development or new product development in a nutrition/food context
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has product operations experience but no food, recipe, or nutrition product development background

gaps.gap: Pan-European dietary trends, regulations, and nutrition science expertise
gaps.mitigation: No evidence of regulatory or scientific nutrition domain knowledge in candidate profile

gaps.gap: Client-facing nutrition coaching and trust-building experience
gaps.mitigation: Candidate may have stakeholder management experience but not in a health/dietary advisory or patient/customer coaching context

gaps.gap: Nutrition content creation for PR, social media, and customer education
gaps.mitigation: No evidence of marketing, PR, or nutrition education content work

hard_blockers.evidence: JD states: "3+ years practising as a Registered Dietitian, with an active certification/licence in the EU." This is a professional credential requirement that is core to the role and cannot be waived or acquired during tenure.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 3+ years practising as a Registered Dietitian with active certification; reporting to Head of Product; end-to-end ownership of nutrition in a small, fast-moving team. Domain-specific seniority is L4-equivalent (established practitioner level); absence of company size/stage context and manager-of-managers scope keeps confidence moderate.
output.summary: This is a specialist Nutrition Manager role requiring a Registered Dietitian credential and 3+ years practising experience in nutrition/dietetics—a disqualifying hard requirement the candidate does not meet. Although the candidate has strong Strategy and Operations experience and can demonstrate program leadership, cross-functional collaboration, and product operations ownership, the role's core accountabilities (owning nutrition database, recipe formulation review, dietitian consultation programme, nutrition content) are deeply domain-specific. No evidence in the candidate profile demonstrates nutrition, food, dietary, or health science expertise. This is a deprioritized fit due to function mismatch (specialist health/nutrition domain) and hard-blocker status.
uncertainties: Company size and stage of HelloFresh's Factor brand not stated in JD; assumes established scale but may affect L4 vs. L5 assessment
Unclear whether candidate has any informal health, nutrition, or wellness background not documented in the profile
Degree and regulatory pathway to Registered Dietitian status varies by EU country; profile does not address any qualification pathway
